read_only_reference_assets.risk_reason: Requires Playwright browser bootstrap for cf_clearance cookie capture; targets /api/data/matchDetails which returns 403 without session. Browser/session/cookie/anti-bot stack.
Automates Turnstile bypass; manages 22-node port map for FotMob sessions; opens visible browsers; captures and persists Cloudflare cookies.
Opens visible browser for FotMob login/cookie capture; saves authenticated session state.
Progressive navigation + proxy rotation + Cloudflare cookie establishment methodology (though targets OddsPortal, technique is site-agnostic).
Bezier mouse movement, scroll simulation, vision healing, CAPTCHA bypass primitives.
30+ spoofed browser fingerprint pool; WebGL renderer pool; matches capture_auth.js fingerprint for FotMob.
Generic Playwright browser lifecycle; not FotMob-specific but enables anti-bot bypass via stealth scripts.
Playwright context pool management for multi-session harvesting.
Uses Playwright browser; league-level scraping with NetworkInterceptor; browser-based DOM scanning.
Passive API endpoint discovery via Playwright page request/response events; requires browser runtime.
Full harvesting pipeline: capture_auth.js, inject_golden_cookies.js, auto_harvest_v6.js, sniffer_harvest_v6.js. Contains cookie injection, auth capture, automated harvesting with anti-bot bypass.
Legacy hyper_swarm_stealth.js and related scripts; massive-scale anti-bot harvesting infrastructure.

source_adapter_requirements: Map source fields to canonical general/header/content structure
Normalize stat names to standard keys
Preserve xG data at both aggregate and shot level
validation_rules: matchId must be present and numeric/string-compatible
content must have at minimum: stats OR lineup OR events
general.homeTeam and general.awayTeam must be present
header.tournament should be present for league matches

required_before_raw_write: no production DB write without explicit authorization
